content.speakerText: Your visa is approved. Here's your passport. Welcome to the US!
content.speakerTextCn: 你的签证通过了，这是你的护照，欢迎来美国！
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! I really appreciate it.
Thanks! I can't wait to start my journey.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了感谢类关键词如 'thank', 'appreciate', 'great'

content.speakerText: Don't forget to check your email for SEVIS registration instructions.
content.speakerTextCn: 别忘了查邮箱，会有SEVIS注册说明。
expectedAnswers: Got it — I'll check right away.
Will do, thanks for reminding me.
Okay, I'll make sure to look for it today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表明听懂并会执行
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化但礼貌的回应
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'check', 'email', 'SEVIS', 'reminder' 相关表达

content.speakerText: Your visa process is complete. We wish you a successful start in the US.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的签证流程已完成，祝你在美国的起步顺利。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! I really appreciate your help.
Thanks! I'm excited and ready to begin.
I'm grateful for your support — have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应祝福并表达感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合告别场景的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thank', 'appreciate', 'grateful', 'wish', 'success' 等关键词
